title: MyPermissions
description: A simple plugin to handle permissions, groups, prefixes and suffixes with GUI and Web Interface
body:
![MyPermissions-Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2857a3170544407692ad99cb72de47cf53af9a8.png) # [Download now!](https://modrinth.com/plugin/mypermissions/versions) ## Why should you use MyPermissions? - **Over 61.000 downloads on [Bukkit](https://dev.bukkit.org/projects/mypermissions)!** - **Active support on [Discord](https://discord.gg/7URCZM7XXp)!** - **Servers running MyPermissions world wide! ([bStats](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/My-Permissions/16698) - used since V1.3.0)** - **Easy to use and setup** - **Web-Interface and ingame-GUI** - **It's open-source ([GitHub](https://github.com/ManatorDE/MyPermissions/))**
Features

Groups

  • Prefixes and Suffixes
  • Permissions and Negations
  • Group ranks
  • Default group - everyone that joins is added
  • Ingame-GUI to configure groups

Players

  • Permissions and Negations

Web-interface

  • Manage players
  • Manage groups
    • Create groups
    • Configure your groups
    • Add or remove players
    • Set group as default
  • Reload MyPermissions

Detailed information and all commands are in the wiki

## You want new features? - **Just join the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/7URCZM7XXp) and request it!** ## You need help? - **Visit the [Wiki](https://wiki.manator.org/)!** - **Just join the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/7URCZM7XXp) and ask your questions!**
